title: Add Design principles (6 rules)
description: No gradients, no purple/multicolor, no glow, default shadows, empty states, color restraint
design:
## Principles (6)

1. **design-ibelick-no-gradients** - Avoid gradients unless requested
2. **design-ibelick-no-purple** - No purple or multicolor gradients
3. **design-ibelick-no-glow** - NEVER use glow as primary affordances
4. **design-ibelick-default-shadows** - Stick with Tailwind default shadows
5. **design-ibelick-empty-states** - MUST give empty states one clear action
6. **design-ibelick-color-restraint** - Limit accent colors to one per view

## Files to Create
- 6 MDX files in content/principles/design/
- 12 example components
- 6 entries in principles.ts
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] 6 MDX files created
- [ ] Empty state example shows clear CTA
- [ ] Color restraint example shows focused palette

title: Add Components principles (6 rules)
description: Accessible primitives, existing components, no primitive mixing, Base UI, icon buttons, manual behavior
design:
## Principles (6)

1. **interactions-ibelick-accessible-primitives** - MUST use accessible primitives for keyboard/focus
2. **interactions-ibelick-existing-components** - MUST use existing components first
3. **interactions-ibelick-no-primitive-mixing** - NEVER mix primitive systems
4. **interactions-ibelick-base-ui** - Consider Base UI for new accessible components
5. **interactions-ibelick-icon-buttons** - MUST add aria-label to icon-only buttons
6. **interactions-ibelick-manual-behavior** - Avoid rebuilding keyboard/focus behavior

## Files to Create
- 6 MDX files in content/principles/interactions/
- 12 example components
- 6 entries in principles.ts
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] 6 MDX files created
- [ ] 12 example components render correctly
- [ ] Examples demonstrate accessible vs inaccessible patterns

title: Add Typography principles (4 rules)
description: Text balance, tabular nums, text overflow, letter spacing
design:
## Principles (4)

1. **content-ibelick-text-balance** - text-balance for headings, text-pretty for body
2. **content-ibelick-tabular-nums** - MUST use tabular-nums for data tables
3. **content-ibelick-text-overflow** - Apply truncate or line-clamp for dense layouts
4. **content-ibelick-letter-spacing** - Avoid modifying unless requested

## Files to Create
- 4 MDX files in content/principles/content/
- 8 example components
- 4 entries in principles.ts
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] 4 MDX files created
- [ ] Examples show text-balance vs text-pretty

title: Add @Ibelick UI Skills as Principles
description: Add ~38 UI Skills from ui-skills.com by @Ibelick as new principles with Good/Bad examples. Orange/amber badge color.
design:
## Architecture

Follow exact pattern from RAMS implementation:
1. Add source type to `src/types/principle.ts`
2. Add source registry entry in `src/components/source-registry.ts`
3. Create MDX files in `content/principles/{category}/`
4. Create example components in `src/components/examples/{category}/`
5. Add principle entries to `src/data/principles.ts`

## File Structure
```
content/principles/
├── animations/ibelick-*.mdx (7 files)
├── interactions/ibelick-*.mdx (8 files)
├── forms/ibelick-*.mdx (3 files)
├── layout/ibelick-*.mdx (4 files)
├── content/ibelick-*.mdx (4 files)
├── performance/ibelick-*.mdx (4 files)
└── design/ibelick-*.mdx (6 files)

src/components/examples/
├── animations/Ibelick*Good.tsx, Ibelick*Bad.tsx
├── interactions/Ibelick*Good.tsx, Ibelick*Bad.tsx
...
```

## Badge Styling
Orange/Amber: `bg-amber-500 text-white border-amber-500`
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] 'ibelick' source type added and compiles
- [ ] Source filter shows @Ibelick with orange dot
- [ ] All 38 principles appear in sidebar
- [ ] Each principle has Good/Bad examples
- [ ] Total principle count increases to 169 (131 + 38)

title: Build Beads + Ralph Loop + Compound Agents Workflow
description:
Build an autonomous workflow system combining:
- **Beads**: Git-native task memory with dependencies
- **Ralph Loop**: Iterative execution with fresh context
- **Compound Agents**: Specialized parallel reviewers

Goal: Create a bash-based orchestrator that reads tasks from .beads/, determines phase (plan/work/review/compound), launches appropriate compound agents, and iterates until completion.

Success criteria:
1. Working ralph loop script
2. Phase detection from beads labels
3. Compound agent integration per phase
4. End-to-end test completing a real task
close_reason: Built complete workflow: ralph-beads.sh script, PROMPT.md template, README docs. All subtasks completed.

title: Test end-to-end with real task
description: Run the workflow on a real task to validate it works
close_reason: Validated workflow with dry-run and real task (README creation)

close_reason: Implemented check_exit_conditions() with heuristic pattern matching + explicit EXIT_SIGNAL check

title: Add Interaction principles (6 rules)
description: AlertDialog, loading skeletons, viewport height, safe areas, error placement, no paste blocking
design:
## Principles (6)

1. **interactions-ibelick-alert-dialog** - MUST use AlertDialog for destructive actions
2. **interactions-ibelick-loading-skeletons** - Use skeletons instead of spinners
3. **layout-ibelick-viewport-height** - NEVER use h-screen, use h-dvh
4. **layout-ibelick-safe-areas** - MUST respect safe-area-inset
5. **forms-ibelick-error-placement** - MUST show errors next to action
6. **forms-ibelick-no-paste-blocking** - NEVER block paste

## Files to Create
- 6 MDX files across interactions/layout/forms
- 12 example components
- 6 entries in principles.ts
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] 6 MDX files created in correct categories
- [ ] 12 example components demonstrate patterns
- [ ] AlertDialog example shows confirmation flow

title: Add Animation principles (7 rules)
description: Intentional only, compositor properties, no layout animation, minimize paint, timing, pause offscreen, reduced motion
design:
## Principles (7)

1. **animations-ibelick-intentional-only** - NEVER add animation unless requested
2. **animations-ibelick-compositor-only** - Animate only transform and opacity
3. **animations-ibelick-no-layout** - NEVER animate width/height/top/left
4. **animations-ibelick-minimize-paint** - Minimize animating colors/backgrounds
5. **animations-ibelick-timing** - ease-out for entrances, <200ms for interactions
6. **animations-ibelick-pause-offscreen** - Pause looping animations when not visible
7. **animations-ibelick-reduced-motion** - SHOULD respect prefers-reduced-motion

## Files to Create
- 7 MDX files in content/principles/animations/
- 14 example components
- 7 entries in principles.ts
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] 7 MDX files created
- [ ] Examples show compositor vs layout property animations
- [ ] Reduced motion example respects media query

## Principles (3)

1. **performance-ibelick-no-blur-animation** - NEVER animate large blur/backdrop-filter
2. **performance-ibelick-will-change** - Only apply during active animations
3. **performance-ibelick-no-effect-render** - NEVER use useEffect for render logic

title: Add Stack principles (4 rules)
description: Tailwind defaults, motion library, tw-animate-css, cn utility
design:
## Principles (4)

1. **performance-ibelick-tailwind-defaults** - MUST use Tailwind CSS defaults unless custom values exist
2. **animations-ibelick-motion-library** - MUST use motion/react for JS animations
3. **animations-ibelick-tw-animate** - Use tw-animate-css for entrance/micro animations
4. **forms-ibelick-cn-utility** - MUST use cn utility (clsx + tailwind-merge)

## Files to Create
- 4 MDX files
- 8 example components (Good/Bad pairs)
- 4 entries in principles.ts
